title: Data Validation on Work Management
excerpt: I came across a support link that seems to fix data validation issues that I currently am encountering. After many attempts of speaking with different support agents through the chat option – alongside with the champion …

posts.author: schaffler33 (Amanda Schaffler)
posts.cookedHtml:
I came across a support link that seems to fix data validation issues that I currently am encountering. After many attempts of speaking with different support agents through the chat option – alongside with the champion training – I am unable to find a way to enable these features on my account.

Here is the link: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/29863034416786-Data-validations

Can someone please help me get this enabled on my account? I already have enabled “Beta column … features” through monday labs, but this still does not show said feature.

Thank you!

posts.author: alea-cxmonday (Alea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Amanda! My name is Alea, and I am part of the Customer Experience team at monday.com.

Thanks so much for sharing the link and for the detailed context. I’m glad you reached out about this!

The Data Validations feature is currently in a closed beta, which is why it is not appearing on your account just yet, even with the Beta column features enabled in monday labs.

I was able to locate your account on my end, and I’ll open a private thread with you to help get this sorted and see about enabling access for you.

Keep an eye out for my message shortly, and we’ll take it from there!

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @schaffler33

Data Validations are still rolling out, so they may not be available on every account yet even with Beta column features enabled in Labs.

If you still don’t see the option, it likely hasn’t been enabled for your account. Best next step is to open a support ticket and ask for access to the Data Validation beta, including your account ID.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard
